code: @Manual{,   title = {insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions},   author = {Maximilian Muecke},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://m-muecke.github.io/insidertrade/}, }

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: insidertrade provides access SEC insider trading data (Forms 3/4/5) two sources: Insider transactions bulk data sets (quarterly TSV downloads) EDGAR submissions API (company filing metadata)

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: can install development version GitHub :

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
code: library(data.table) library(insidertrade)  # download and parse all Form 3/4/5 tables for Q2 2024 data <- sec_form345(2024, 2) str(lapply(data, dim)) #> List of 8 #>  $ deriv_holding   : int [1:2] 9416 26 #>  $ deriv_trans     : int [1:2] 28048 42 #>  $ footnotes       : int [1:2] 116519 3 #>  $ nonderiv_holding: int [1:2] 21166 14 #>  $ nonderiv_trans  : int [1:2] 69412 28 #>  $ owner_signature : int [1:2] 56261 3 #>  $ reportingowner  : int [1:2] 56838 13 #>  $ submission      : int [1:2] 52802 14  # get transactions joined with submission and owner details trans <- sec_transactions(2024, 2)  # filter to open-market purchases by officers and directors buys <- trans[   trans_code == "P" &     grepl("Officer|Director", rptowner_relationship) &     trans_date >= "2024-04-01" &     trans_date <= "2024-06-30" ]  # top 10 companies by number of distinct insider buyers top <- buys[, .(   n_insiders = uniqueN(rptownercik),   total_shares = sum(trans_shares, na.rm = TRUE) ), by = .(ticker = issuertradingsymbol, company = issuername)][order(-n_insiders)] head(top, 10) #>     ticker                       company n_insiders total_shares #>     <char>                        <char>      <int>        <num> #>  1:    ULS             UL Solutions Inc.         22    590669.00 #>  2:   UUUU              ENERGY FUELS INC         15     74135.00 #>  3:    SPG SIMON PROPERTY GROUP INC /DE/         11      2198.00 #>  4:   BCRX  BIOCRYST PHARMACEUTICALS INC         10    183601.00 #>  5:    LAB        STANDARD BIOTOOLS INC.          9  18468648.00 #>  6:    CRM              Salesforce, Inc.          9   3426051.00 #>  7:   GHLD             Guild Holdings Co          9     19903.79 #>  8:   GNLX                  GENELUX Corp          9    268000.00 #>  9:   CBKM    CONSUMERS BANCORP INC /OH/          9      3847.48 #> 10:   NFBK      Northfield Bancorp, Inc.          9     75851.00  # plot insider purchases over the quarter library(ggplot2)  daily <- buys[, .(n_purchases = .N, total_shares = sum(trans_shares, na.rm = TRUE)),   by = trans_date ]  ggplot(daily, aes(x = trans_date, y = n_purchases)) +   geom_col() +   scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +   theme_minimal() +   theme(     plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),     panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2),     panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),     panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),     axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),     axis.title = element_blank()   ) +   labs(title = "Daily Insider Purchases (Q2 2024)")

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: convenience wrapper around edgar_submissions() filters insider trading forms (Forms 3, 4, 5).

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: https://www.sec.gov/search-filings/edgar-application-programming-interfaces

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: cik (integer(1) | character(1)) SEC Central Index Key entity.

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: data.table::data.table() one row per insider filing.

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
code: # \donttest{ # Apple Inc. insider filings insider <- edgar_insider_filings(320193) # }

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: Fetch submissions (filing history) given CIK number SEC EDGAR API.

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: https://www.sec.gov/search-filings/edgar-application-programming-interfaces

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: cik (integer(1) | character(1)) SEC Central Index Key entity.

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: data.table::data.table() one row per filing, containing columns accession_number, filing_date, form, primary_document, others.

text: Download parse SEC insider trading data (Forms 3/4/5) quarterly bulk data sets EDGAR submissions API.

title: Clear the cache — sec_cache_clear
text: Deletes cached ZIP files downloaded sec_form345().

title: Clear the cache — sec_cache_clear
text: NULL invisibly.

title: Get the cache directory — sec_cache_dir
text: Returns path directory downloaded SEC data files cached.

title: Get the cache directory — sec_cache_dir
text: character() string path cache directory.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: Download parse quarterly bulk ZIP file SEC's insider transactions data sets.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: https://www.sec.gov/data-research/sec-markets-data/insider-transactions-data-sets

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: year (integer(1)) year filing (e.g. 2024). quarter (integer(1)) fiscal quarter. Must 1 4. table (NULL | character()) Table names return. Valid names "deriv_holding", "deriv_trans", "footnotes", "nonderiv_holding", "nonderiv_trans", "owner_signature", "reportingowner", "submission". Default NULL. NULL, tables returned.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: named list data.table::data.table()s, one per table ZIP file. table length 1, single data.table::data.table() returned.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
code: # \donttest{ # Get all tables for Q2 2024 data <- sec_form345(2024, 2) names(data) #> [1] "deriv_holding"    "deriv_trans"      "footnotes"        "nonderiv_holding" #> [5] "nonderiv_trans"   "owner_signature"  "reportingowner"   "submission"        # Get only the submission table sub <- sec_form345(2024, 2, "submission") # }

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: Download quarterly Form 3/4/5 data join nonderiv_trans table submission reportingowner tables accession_number.

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: https://www.sec.gov/data-research/sec-markets-data/insider-transactions-data-sets

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: year (integer(1)) year filing (e.g. 2024). quarter (integer(1)) fiscal quarter. Must 1 4.

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: data.table::data.table() transaction data joined submission reporting owner information.

title: insidertrade (development version)
text: edgar_insider_filings() filters EDGAR submissions Forms 3, 4, 5. edgar_submissions() fetches company filing metadata EDGAR API. sec_cache_clear() deletes cached ZIP files. sec_cache_dir() returns cache directory path. sec_form345() downloads parses quarterly SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data. sec_transactions() returns insider transactions joined submission owner details.
